resume.summary: Creative and versatile B.Tech student experienced in writing, scripting, and producing content across blogs, social media, and video formats. Skilled at translating technical and lifestyle topics into engaging content. Seeking a Content Creation Internship to grow brand voice and audience reach.

education.degree: Bachelor of Mass Media — Journalism & Communication
education.school: Symbiosis Institute of Media and Communication, Pune
education.coursework: Relevant Coursework: Feature Writing, Editorial Design, Media Research, SEO Writing, Public Relations

technicalSkills.skillGroup: Blog Writing, Scriptwriting, Social Captions, Newsletters
SEO Basics, Storytelling, Research, Editorial Calendars

experience.title: Content Creation Intern — Synapse Analytics Pvt. Ltd., Pune

bullets.bullet: Wrote 15+ blog articles on AI and tech trends, increasing organic blog traffic by 30%.
Scripted short-form videos for social channels, contributing to a 20% rise in engagement.
Maintained an editorial calendar coordinating content across 3 platforms.
Published 10 SEO-optimised articles on ML and career topics, reaching 4,200+ reads on Medium.
Researched and fact-checked technical content for accuracy and clarity.
Redesigned a monthly newsletter format, increasing open rate from 18% to 32%.
Wrote concise, engaging copy tailored to a student audience.
Co-produced a 6-episode podcast on student entrepreneurship, scripted and edited each episode.
Promoted episodes via social teasers, growing listenership steadily across the series.

certification.title: Content Strategy for Professionals — Northwestern University

achievements.achievement: Selected among 80 students college-wide for the Smart India Hackathon (SIH 2024) internal round.
Received the Academic Excellence Award for Semester 2 with the highest GPA (9.3) in the CSE department cohort of 120 students.
Active contributor to two college-wide technical fests, coordinating logistics and technical sessions for 150+ participants.

extracurricular.activity: Core Member, Technical Club, VIT Pune — organised hands-on workshops for 150+ students (2023–Present).
Technical Blogger — published articles on Medium covering tools and best practices relevant to the field; collectively read 4,000+ times.
Volunteer Mentor, CodeForGood (NGO Initiative) — guided 15 high school students through technology fundamentals over an 8-week programme.
